---
layout: default
title: "Parliamentary Legislative Activity and Diplomatic Outreach"
date: 2026-07-07T16:44:01.506826+00:00
summary: "Parliament advances key social and constitutional bills while PM Modi strengthens India-Indonesia ties through a historic address in Jakarta"
run_time_ist: "10:14PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:14PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legislative Progress:</strong> Parliament has passed the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026, while the Lok Sabha continues deliberations on the Delimitation Bill and the Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I41</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxQU3ZPV0tBQ0k0Q2ZRTFZWZ1JVTjIyOWY4U2VVcEtUMzNURDBlSUdheU1TamkwWWZSQTczRXR2ZUttTUZkdnBJS2JhdFRQTmlIamtZZEpEQ2ROOVJISm9OSXhEYk84TmUyZUJOTHgzci1PaVFSeTlHMWpzQV9rOWEwWHNualRibzRieVJzSXNRY1ZDdVVsSGhGdEVFRjZXeEhoSnFkS2RnbUNpRFFfaFFiWEQwQUVSbGZiZW91ZFpnTjZOLVF0?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I42</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTE5NUmxlOFYxbkc2bWdTWkJmUjZYb0otV2c5VGVld2poazVEVGlRdWJjUjFmT181cFg5Nnc1VXRnZ3BWOVNjQzd2TWkxYndybkNxdnVjZGs0UmtsODlDVmpEYVMwZmVhZDJRanprU0R0bDllbW0yUm1hZ1lyXzk?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I45</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxNekwzdlZWMTFtYkpIR3JwVWxLQXk1d0NBb2FSdHJpRmtYeGQ5b3NsVFRPSFBrMUVFZTg1eHRHenFVbTdQV3V6SzF0TWl5S0VKc1pOOExxaVctVmtKdEpjSFowbTNPRHNqcndfakJ1WDVxQUVjaWN1RkVUN3FnNFVFNVIzRGxyekZiYk9MWGR5VWZmbW5nWXg4bS1RWVA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I46</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Diplomatic Milestone:</strong> PM Modi became the first Indian Prime Minister to address the Indonesian Parliament, emphasizing a &quot;Ganga–Mahakam Vision&quot; and rejecting expansionism in favor of development and regional cooperation.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPLWNUUF9Ta29vUFEzUV9ZWThyV0lJNFpCZnE4X2Y1aHJQNjRrcE5pZzItOVFKVEhfRjlVTWFMVGl2cTNOTDY3LUEwalVFZkpHSGxVZTJYdUlYNC1LVUNMQnB6WlVGbmZkNmc4MTgxR1Z5U0tIdUllaW91NkFHZmZwQ0JhUldfd0tEVjhZb2lmU0w3RlRpUFpaaWFNSFpKaU0?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxObjREM1YzdkhZb0c5cHR2N0lpa2xhcjFWUkgzU3lCYTdlNHFJd19PVWRlZm1sNE1Vczd4YTA3dHJXcWVHWmVKODF4ZmkwUWJQek9VdldHOUd2TGxqYnl6U1lTOGtyUXZrdXZ2VktQYzFWQnVBUzhmdERZU1BESXJhS2pWN3hvcUdoUkRPUDVqWVVyNzFTT1BELUtNdVBBNUpBNEE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxPQlZueUF6ejVZbXdtSXZvWXZPX1BzLWpTY2Y1dFJYdXF6ZHc2b1JWNTZXbTA3SFI1SnpfYmhiRU9wLWo3LVJoWmVYUFhvX0ZXN2JGSWVRbE9OZ0MyazFpU3VNdnJPNWdjbzFmS2p1SGlrVktDYlhDMWtBYnkweTF5LWJkaHVfMS16bGhTRnlYbkNELXJZdXFvWjFMMmxib0tSVFVnVGFQZ3Awb0dZMXRNdGE0WnhSRDJSR2pvaFdIR0FnVFA3?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I31</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election Commission Updates:</strong> The Election Commission has scheduled Rajya Sabha bypolls for three West Bengal seats on July 24, while India and Indonesia signed an MoU to enhance democratic cooperation and election technology.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I37</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I40</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxQSzY3QUVzYml4ZkdvcWQzSmlBTE5VN1p5M0p1eFRibGRfTmVERmxVNHhYdGNwWkozVVMydlFEZy01ZG95cEhXVkEtVTJ4VVB6cDRLbFJBN1NWTUkySlRyNDNyUzEtNFhKb0VYOHpjYWtFZ3RlX0lCcjJFcEkzY0RZUU95VDB5OTdLQVRZQXVfODBwMmtEbWxSYjdtUEw0eHdpeFd3NU1Jc1lNR25kTTdBQlhMeGRjNHdfVXRVTjdwZEhDai1rcG11OHk1bw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I50</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I51</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Women’s Reservation Bill:</strong> The proposed Constitutional Amendment Bill aimed at providing reservation for women in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies has failed to pass in the Lok Sabha.</li>
  <li><strong>Judicial and Nomination Disputes:</strong> The Supreme Court clarified that its ruling on Election Commissioner appointments was intended as an interim measure, while legal challenges continue regarding the rejection of Meenakshi Natarajan’s Rajya Sabha nomination.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxQTTJxRG1QQzdQR3VlZE1GTnJSX1dtYzl0eEoxdUVEU2h4bDhXSmZLRXVYelhRRHY4amQtb3JndFczcF9iZXlyME1sOHU5VGZFcjJTMG5NX1k5NUl6eUc0eXZxWDB4X0tnZXBFNGJfSDlYamFYUTZrOUI3OWxXMWNsY1M2NWZNRXI4UWlLbU53V3k4Ymx6eWVyNjA2NGxRR3F5dGVjbFlYWnBZTUNEd0plTDFn?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W18</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W19</a></span></li>
</ul>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiswFBVV95cUxPQkdBOWFKejY4NmdzU1EtSGlWcEhoWXk3QzJTbGxYRGpZQkwwR2M3N3pXYkRkVUcxTzVaaDVrNkx4VkZBc1k0QW81MUMwYWYtczNxZHZlQVgtUkNFUHVSdHp1TkNNMHJXbFdDZzc1WTlMTmdkdmFzeHVLMUM3aVAxWXFuaS1yLXNhUW54Z2ZpVVpodEd5Tm9rdnk0bDl1ZlZOS3JwdFBUYTBFUWJydG5xS0dqMA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[I29] India Follows Path Of Development, Not Expansionism: PM Modi At Indonesian Parliament - Menafn</a> Menafn</li>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[I32] ‘Both countries share common heritage’: PM Modi addresses Indonesian Parliament - News9live</a> News9live</li>
